CustomField.description: When enabled, allows different payment gateways to be assigned to Gift Entry batches instead of always using the default gateway. Disabled by default. When disabled, all Gift Entry batches use the organization's default payment gateway. This setting only applies to Gift Entry batches that process payments through a connected gateway.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Allow different payment gateways to be assigned to Gift Entry batches instead of always using the default.
CustomField.label: Enable Gateway Assignment
